casey.instructions_template: Kick off AISMR trace about {topic}. Confirm project alignment, then hand off to Iggy with a clear brief.
handoff_checklist: Project confirmed or updated via trace_update
Topic validated and scoped to AISMR constraints

requirements: Each modifier must be unique and tactile
At least 3 references to archive memories
Tag risky ideas for Casey review
iggy.handoff_template: handoff_to_agent({"traceId": "{traceId}", "toAgent": "riley", "instructions": "Transform each modifier into a short micro-film script."})

riley.handoff_template: handoff_to_agent({"traceId": "{traceId}", "toAgent": "veo", "instructions": "Storyboard and render each beat into a video stub."})

requirements: Verify transitions align with audio cues
Generate TikTok caption in AISMR voice
Call handoff_to_agent with toAgent="complete" after upload
